channel.title: Stockwatch - Key Events
channel.description: Real-time corporate announcements, deals, and financial results.

item.title: [NNTL] N2N Technologies: Harmony Remedies launches open offer for 40% stake at ₹4.30/share
item.description:
🔥 Trending

Harmony Remedies India Private Limited, along with Persons Acting in Concert (PACs), has launched a mandatory open offer to acquire up to 1,291,228 equity shares of N2N Technologies Limited. This represents 40% of the expanded voting capital at a price of ₹4.30 per fully paid-up equity share, payable in cash. SEBI provided its final observation letter on April 13, 2026, and the Letter of Offer is now being dispatched to public shareholders. The open offer is scheduled to open on Thursday, April 30, 2026, and close on Thursday, May 14, 2026. The offer is not conditional upon any minimum level of acceptance.

  • Harmony Remedies India Private Limited launches open offer for N2N Technologies.
  • Acquirer seeks to buy 1,291,228 shares, representing 40% of voting capital.
  • Offer price is ₹4.30 per equity share, payable in cash.
  • Offer opens April 30, 2026, and closes May 14, 2026.
  • The open offer is mandatory and not conditional on minimum acceptance.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: N2N Technologies Limited | Category: Open Offer

item.title: [GKSL] Gujarat Kidney & Super Speciality approves WOS for Bharuch healthcare
item.description:
🔥 Trending

Gujarat Kidney and Super Speciality Ltd's Board approved the incorporation of a Wholly Owned Subsidiary (WOS) on April 27, 2026, to expand healthcare services in Bharuch, Gujarat. This move, already approved by shareholders via postal ballot, aims to augment the company's existing medical facilities. The Board also appointed Ms. Vishakha Mahesh Phadke as Company Secretary and Compliance Officer and noted shareholder approvals for interim fund utilization for healthcare expansion, voluntary revision of financial statements, and the appointment of a secretarial auditor for FY2025-26.

  • Board approved the incorporation of a Wholly Owned Subsidiary (WOS).
  • WOS will expand healthcare services in Bharuch, Gujarat.
  • Shareholders previously approved WOS and healthcare expansion funds.
  • Ms. Vishakha Mahesh Phadke appointed as Company Secretary.
  • Secretarial Auditor appointed for FY2025-26.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Gujarat Kidney and Super Speciality Ltd | Category: Subsidiary

item.title: [NTL] Neueon Board to meet May 1 for Q4/FY26 results & strategic investments
item.description:
Neueon Corporation Ltd. has scheduled a Board of Directors meeting for May 1, 2026. The key agenda items include considering and approving the Audited standalone and consolidated Financial Results and Statements for the quarter and financial year ended March 31, 2026. The Board will also take note of the Auditors’ Report for the same period and consider the appointment of an Internal Auditor for the financial year 2026-27. Additionally, the meeting will focus on evaluating strategic investments and acquisitions in identified sectors such as defense, renewable energy, and education technology (Ed-tech). In compliance with insider trading regulations, the trading window for designated persons remains closed from April 1, 2026, until 48 hours after the financial results are announced.

  • Board meeting scheduled for May 1, 2026.
  • Q4 and FY26 financial results to be approved.
  • Strategic investments/acquisitions in defense, renewable energy, Ed-tech to be evaluated.
  • Internal Auditor for FY2026-27 to be considered.
  • Trading window closed until results announcement.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Neueon Towers Ltd | Category: Board Meeting

item.title: [KOTYARK] Kotyark Appoints Viral Mamtora as Independent Director
item.description:
Kotyark Industries Ltd announced the results of its postal ballot, approving the appointment of Mr. Viral Mukeshbhai Mamtora (DIN: 08440935) as a Non-Executive Independent Director for a period of one year. The resolution passed as a special business with 100% of the polled votes in favor. Additionally, shareholders approved the appointment of M/s. Mittal V. Kothari & Associates as Secretarial Auditor for five consecutive years from FY 2025-26 to FY 2029-30, also with 100% of the polled votes in favor.

  • Kotyark Industries approved Mr. Viral Mukeshbhai Mamtora as an Independent Director.
  • The director's appointment is for a one-year term.
  • Shareholders also approved M/s. Mittal V. Kothari & Associates as Secretarial Auditor.
  • Both resolutions passed with 100% votes in favor from the polled votes.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Kotyark Industries Ltd | Category: Management Change

item.title: [ADVMULT] Advance Multitech Board Meeting Concludes Without Resolutions
item.description:
Advance Multitech Ltd announced that its Board of Directors meeting, held on April 27, 2026, concluded without any resolutions being passed. The company's Director, Govind Shah, communicated this outcome, requesting stakeholders to take note of the development.

  • Board meeting held on April 27, 2026.
  • Meeting concluded without passing any resolutions.
  • Outcome communicated by Director Govind Shah.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Advance Multitech Ltd | Category: Board Meeting

item.title: [FABTECH] Fabtech Board approves Q4/FY26 results, recommends 0.60 dividend, Oman subsidiary
item.description:
Fabtech Technologies Ltd's Board of Directors, at its meeting on April 27, 2026, approved the Audited Standalone and Consolidated Financial Results for the quarter and year ended March 31, 2026. The Board also recommended a final dividend of 0.60 per equity share (face value 10) for shareholder approval at the upcoming Annual General Meeting. Additionally, the Board authorized the opening of a new Step-Down Subsidiary of the Company in the Sultanate of Oman.

  • Board approved audited Q4 and FY26 standalone and consolidated financial results.
  • Recommended a final dividend of 0.60 per equity share for shareholder approval.
  • Authorized the establishment of a new step-down subsidiary in the Sultanate of Oman.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Fabtech Technologies Ltd | Category: Board Meeting

item.title: [KOTYARK] Kotyark appoints Mittal V Kothari & Associates as Secretarial Auditor
item.description:
Kotyark Industries Ltd has announced the appointment of M/s. Mittal V. Kothari & Associates as its Secretarial Auditor. This appointment is for a term of five consecutive years, commencing from the financial year 2025-26 and extending up to the financial year 2029-30. The appointment was approved through a postal ballot, with the results declared on April 23, 2026. The resolution for the auditor's appointment was passed as an ordinary resolution with 100% votes in favor from both promoter and public non-institution categories, totaling 61,22,596 votes polled against 0 votes. The postal ballot also included the approval for the appointment of Mr. Viral Mukeshbhai Mamtora as a Non-Executive Independent Director for one year, which also passed with 100% votes in favor.

  • Kotyark Industries appointed M/s. Mittal V. Kothari & Associates as Secretarial Auditor.
  • The auditor's term is five years, from FY2025-26 to FY2029-30.
  • The appointment was approved via postal ballot with 100% votes in favor.
  • Mr. Viral Mamtora also appointed as Non-Executive Independent Director for one year.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Kotyark Industries Ltd | Category: Auditor

item.title: [DIAMONDYD] Prataap Snacks Board Approves FY26 Results; Recommends ₹0.50 Dividend
item.description:
Prataap Snacks Ltd's Board of Directors met on April 27, 2026, to approve the audited financial results for the quarter and year ended March 31, 2026. The Board also recommended a final dividend of ₹0.50 per equity share (10%) for FY26, subject to shareholder approval at the ensuing Annual General Meeting. Additionally, the allotment of 6,981 equity shares to eligible employees under the Prataap Employees Stock Appreciation Rights Plan 2018 was approved. The statutory auditor, BSR & Co. LLP, issued an unmodified opinion on the financial results.

  • Board approved audited financial results for Q4 and full year ended March 31, 2026.
  • Recommended a final dividend of ₹0.50 per share (10%) for FY26.
  • Dividend payment is subject to shareholder approval at the upcoming AGM.
  • Approved allotment of 6,981 equity shares under the ESARP 2018 plan.
  • Auditor BSR & Co. LLP provided an unmodified opinion on the financial results.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Prataap Snacks Ltd | Category: Quarterly Result

item.title: [NNTL] N2N Promoter Rahul Shah discloses 43.11% stake as of Mar 2026
item.description:
N2N Technologies Ltd received its annual disclosure from Promoter Mr. Rahul Dilip Shah under SEBI (Substantial Acquisition of Shares and Takeovers) Regulations, 2011, for the financial year ended March 31, 2026. The disclosure indicates that Mr. Rahul Shah, along with Mrs. Rekha Rani Sarawgi (whose 2,34,500 shares are pending transfer but treated as part of promoter holding), collectively holds 13,91,480 shares, representing 43.11% of the company's total share/voting capital. Furthermore, the disclosure confirms that no additional shares were pledged during the financial year 2025-26, and the pledge of shares as of April 1, 2024, continues to remain in effect.

  • Promoter Rahul Shah disclosed annual shareholding as of March 31, 2026.
  • Promoter group holds 43.11% of N2N Technologies' total shares.
  • A total of 13,91,480 shares are held by the promoter group.
  • No new shares were pledged during the financial year 2025-26.
  • Existing share pledges from April 1, 2024, remain unchanged.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: N2N Technologies Limited | Category: Shareholding

item.title: [RETAIL] JHS Svendgaard Retail Board to meet on Apr 30, 2026 for fundraise
item.description:
JHS Svendgaard Retail Ventures Ltd has announced that its Board of Directors will hold a meeting on Thursday, April 30, 2026. The main purpose of this meeting is to consider and approve a proposal for raising funds. The company is exploring various instruments for this fundraise, including equity shares and/or convertible securities, potentially through a Preferential Issue. In compliance with SEBI regulations and the company's code of conduct, the trading window for dealing in the company's securities for designated persons and their immediate relatives has been closed since April 1, 2026, and will remain closed.

  • Board meeting scheduled for April 30, 2026.
  • Key agenda: consideration of fund-raising proposal.
  • Fundraise may include equity shares or convertible securities.
  • Preferential Issue is a potential method for fundraise.
  • Trading window closed from April 1, 2026.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: JHS Svendgaard Retail Ventures Ltd | Category: Board Meeting
